item.title: Version 2026.03.21
item.description:
What's New in 2026.03.21

  • Models downloaded on first launch instead of bundled — the app no longer ships with the 1.5 GB Whisper model inside the app bundle. On first launch (or after an update that changes the model), the app downloads the model from Hugging Face to `~/Library/Application Support/privisay/Models/`. This shrinks the Sparkle update ZIP from ~1.4 GB to ~50 MB, fixing "improperly signed" errors caused by large file download corruption. Existing users see a one-time model download window after updating.

All transcription happens 100% locally on your device.
